body_html:
If you're searching for an off-the-beaten-path trekking experience in Nepal, the Kokhe Danda Trek is quickly emerging as one of the best alternatives to crowded routes like Poon Hill. But choosing the right operator matters just as much as choosing the destination.

A Trek Born From Exploration

During the global lockdown, Sameer — the founder of Discover Parbat — began exploring the northern region of Parbat. That vision led to the development of the Kokhe Danda Trek — a trail designed to bring trekkers away from crowds and into a quieter, more immersive Himalayan experience.

Why Discover Parbat

  • Founders and creators of the route — not a copied itinerary
  • Authentic homestay experiences in villages along the trail
  • Small groups and deep local knowledge
  • Less crowded trails with real cultural immersion

Ready to experience Kokhe Danda? Get in touch and we'll plan the perfect trip.
